message:
✨ Add real-time cluster creation/deletion progress with Docker pre-check (#1301)

Backend broadcasts phased progress (validating → creating/deleting → done/failed)
via WebSocket. Docker daemon pre-flight check catches missing Docker before
kind/k3d creation fails silently. Frontend shows inline progress banner with
spinner, progress bar, and detailed error messages (modeled on UpdateProgressBanner).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
